title: Office Application Startup Persistence
description: Detects modification of Office startup locations for add-in persistence.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and ((('Command Line' like '*\\Microsoft\\Word\\STARTUP*' or 'Command Line' like '*\\Microsoft\\Excel\\XLSTART*' or 'Command Line' like '*AddIns*')))

tests.test_name: Office Application Startup - Outlook as a C2
